events.text: Assessment complete: the unlapped/unsealed flashing fails compliance under TMS 402 and BIA Technical Notes (7/7A/21), which require continuous, sealed flashing with end dams to prevent water bypass. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, and corrective actions (re-lap/seal joints, add end dams, verify weeps, re-inspect before closing the cavity).
